name: METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1 BONUS CONTENT
short_description: Volume 1 will feature a variety of bonus contents including the two regional versions of Metal Gear, the original version of Snake's Revenge, the first and second Digital Graphic Novels in video form, and a digital soundtrack.
detailed_description:
Past Updates

  • Fixed an issue where users were unable to download the video content
  • Added Steam Deck™ support
  • Added an audio settings feature
  • Added new screen setting features
    Smoothing
    Game Screen Settings
    Screen Filter


About the Game

Those who purchase Volume 1 will also have access to a variety of bonus content including the two regional versions of Metal Gear, the original version of Snake's Revenge, the first and second Digital Graphic Novels in video form, and a digital soundtrack.

[Title lineup]
Metal Gear (NES version)
Metal Gear (FC version)
Snake's Revenge

[Video]
Metal Gear Solid: Digital Graphic Novel
Metal Gear Solid 2: Digital Graphic Novel

*Available as additional downloads.

[Soundtrack]
Metal Gear Solid: Digital Soundtrack
